body_text_sample: Log In / Register Help Contact Us FirstEnergyCorp.com My Account Service Requests Outages Safety Save Energy search Outages Report Power Outage My Outage Information My Town Outages Map Get Outage Notifications Outage Help Streetlight or Outdoor Area Light Problem Storm Information Planned Outages My Town Select A State To View Outage Information NJ OH NY & PA MD & WV NY & PA You can search for outages in New York and Pennsylvania by county, town, city or municipality. Type in your area and select the name from the list. Your selection will be highlighted in yellow in the table below. Click on the name for additional outage information. New York Area Search Pennsylvania Search Sign Up for Alerts and Messaging Receive the latest updates about your outage. Text REG to 544487 (LIGHTS) to get started, or register with your online account at the link below.
